title: 父子之间的爱
subtitle: Father-Son Love, Family Bonds, Generational Relationships
assistant_message: Today we learn: discussing family relationships, expressing parental love, understanding generational differences, and talking about the complexity of father-son bonds.

examples.chinese: 与其抱怨父亲的沉默，不如主动与他沟通。
examples.translation: Rather than complaining about father's silence, it's better to actively communicate with him.
examples.translation_id: Daripada mengeluh tentang keheningan ayah, lebih baik berkomunikasi secara aktif dengannya.

examples.chinese: 与其责备孩子，不如帮助他。
examples.translation: Rather than blaming the child, it's better to help him.
examples.translation_id: Daripada menyalahkan anak, lebih baik membantunya.

examples.chinese: 无论父亲多么严厉，他的爱都是无私的。
examples.translation: No matter how strict the father is, his love is selfless.
examples.translation_id: Tidak peduli seberapa tegas ayah, cintanya tetap tanpa pamrih.

examples.chinese: 无论遇到什么困难，家人都会支持你。
examples.translation: No matter what difficulties you encounter, family will support you.
examples.translation_id: Tidak peduli kesulitan apa yang Anda hadapi, keluarga akan mendukung Anda.

examples.chinese: 父亲很少说话，甚至对我的成绩也不轻易表扬。
examples.translation: Father rarely speaks, even not easily praising my achievements.
examples.translation_id: Ayah jarang berbicara, bahkan tidak mudah memuji prestasiku.

examples.chinese: 他为了家庭付出了一切，甚至牺牲了自己的健康。
examples.translation: He gave everything for the family, even sacrificing his own health.
examples.translation_id: Dia memberikan segalanya untuk keluarga, bahkan mengorbankan kesehatannya sendiri.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zhang Wei
dialogue.chinese: 我总觉得父亲不理解我，他对我期望太高了。
dialogue.pinyin: Wǒ zǒng juéde fùqin bù lǐjiě wǒ, tā duì wǒ qīwàng tài gāo le.
dialogue.translation: I always feel that my father doesn't understand me, his expectations of me are too high.
dialogue.translation_id: Saya selalu merasa ayah tidak memahami saya, harapannya terhadap saya terlalu tinggi.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Li Na
dialogue.chinese: 与其抱怨他不理解你，不如试着主动和他沟通。父爱往往是沉默的。
dialogue.pinyin: Yǔqí bàoyuàn tā bù lǐjiě nǐ, bùrú shìzhe zhǔdòng hé tā gōutōng. Fù'ài wǎngwǎng shì chénmò de.
dialogue.translation: Rather than complaining that he doesn't understand you, try to actively communicate with him. A father's love is often silent.
dialogue.translation_id: Daripada mengeluh dia tidak memahamimu, cobalah berkomunikasi secara aktif dengannya. Cinta ayah sering kali diam.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zhang Wei
dialogue.chinese: 可是我不知道该怎么开口。我害怕让他失望。
dialogue.pinyin: Kěshì wǒ bù zhīdào gāi zěnme kāikǒu. Wǒ hàipà ràng tā shīwàng.
dialogue.translation: But I don't know how to start. I'm afraid of disappointing him.
dialogue.translation_id: Tapi saya tidak tahu harus mulai dari mana. Saya takut mengecewakannya.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Li Na
dialogue.chinese: 无论结果如何，真诚的沟通总是有价值的。试着尊重彼此的不同，理解对方的爱。
dialogue.pinyin: Wúlùn jiéguǒ rúhé, zhēnchéng de gōutōng zǒng shì yǒu jiàzhí de. Shìzhe zūnzhòng bǐcǐ de bùtóng, lǐjiě duìfāng de ài.
dialogue.translation: No matter the outcome, sincere communication is always valuable. Try to respect each other's differences and understand each other's love.
dialogue.translation_id: Tidak peduli hasilnya, komunikasi yang tulus selalu berharga. Cobalah untuk menghormati perbedaan satu sama lain dan memahami cinta masing-masing.

exercises.question: How do you say 'to communicate' in Chinese?
What does the pattern 与其...不如... express?
exercises.question_id: Apa yang diungkapkan oleh pola 与其...不如...?

exercises.question: Complete: 无论遇到什么困难，家人______支持你。
exercises.question_id: Lengkapi: 无论遇到什么困难，家人______支持你。
